service_modules.name: Intake and demand shaping
service_modules.description: How work arrives, is requested, and is shaped before delivery.

service_modules.name: Promise and expectation setting
service_modules.description: How the business communicates timing, scope, readiness, and customer expectations.

service_modules.name: Capacity and deployment
service_modules.description: How people and coverage are allocated to match the real work pattern.

service_modules.name: Readiness and setup
service_modules.description: How teams, stations, tools, and environments are prepared before live delivery.

service_modules.name: Live execution
service_modules.description: How work is performed in the moment under time pressure and service variability.

service_modules.name: Handoffs and coordination
service_modules.description: How information and responsibility move across roles, stations, or teams.

service_modules.name: Quality and standards
service_modules.description: How the system maintains consistency, standard work, and visible quality.

service_modules.name: Recovery and exception handling
service_modules.description: How the business responds when service, quality, or customer expectations break.

service_modules.name: Leadership and management rhythm
service_modules.description: How managers create direction, presence, communication cadence, and escalation rhythm.

service_modules.name: Commercial and control loops
service_modules.description: How the business closes the loop on waste, loss, stock, margin, and operational controls.

service_modules.name: Learning and improvement
service_modules.description: How the business reflects, updates standards, and improves from execution reality.

failure_families.name: Demand-capacity mismatch
failure_families.description: Workload, pacing, or complexity exceeds the deployed capacity.

failure_families.name: Readiness failure
failure_families.description: The team enters delivery without being properly prepared.

failure_families.name: Role clarity failure
failure_families.description: Ownership, responsibilities, or boundaries are not explicit enough.

failure_families.name: Handoff failure
failure_families.description: Information, timing, or responsibility transfer breaks between people or nodes.

failure_families.name: Standards drift
failure_families.description: Operational execution no longer matches the intended standard.

failure_families.name: Capability gap
failure_families.description: The team lacks the skill, training, or reinforcement to execute reliably.

failure_families.name: Leadership rhythm failure
failure_families.description: Managerial cadence, visibility, or escalation structure is too weak.

failure_families.name: Control-loop failure
failure_families.description: The business does not measure, review, or correct recurring operational loss.

failure_families.name: Tool or resource friction
failure_families.description: Teams are blocked by missing, unreliable, or poorly fitted tools and resources.

failure_families.name: Exception recovery failure
failure_families.description: The organization handles disruptions reactively instead of recovering cleanly.

failure_families.name: Accountability failure
failure_families.description: Work is not owned, checked, or followed through consistently.

failure_families.name: Learning failure
failure_families.description: The same problems repeat because the system does not update itself from outcomes.

response_logics.name: Stabilize visibility
response_logics.description: Make the live state visible quickly so the team can stop flying blind.

response_logics.name: Align roles and coverage
response_logics.description: Reset ownership, deployment, and coverage to fit the actual work pattern.

response_logics.name: Strengthen handoffs
response_logics.description: Improve transfer points so work moves cleanly between people and stages.

response_logics.name: Install operating rhythm
response_logics.description: Create repeatable cadence, routines, and managerial structure.

response_logics.name: Tighten control loops
response_logics.description: Measure, review, and correct the leaks that keep recurring.

response_logics.name: Build capability
response_logics.description: Increase team execution quality through training, coaching, and reinforcement.

response_logics.name: Reduce operational complexity
response_logics.description: Lower the operational load or complexity so the system can perform reliably.
